items.title: Joe Rogan Experience #2468 - Luke Grimes
items.author: PowerfulJRE
items.content:
<article>Luke Grimes is an actor and musician who stars as Kayce Dutton in the “Yellowstone” spin-off series “Marshals,” airing Sundays at 8 PM Pacific / 7 PM Central on CBS and available to stream on Paramount+. His new album, “Red Bird,” will be released on April 3.

https://www.cbs.com/shows/marshals
